name: Tempo MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Tempo — the leading time tracking and resource planning app for Jira. Enables AI agents to log work, query worklogs, analyze time spent on Jira issues, and generate time reports through Tempo's API. Integrates Tempo time tracking into AI-assisted project management and billing workflows.
use_cases: Logging time entries to Jira issues from development workflow agents
Querying team worklog summaries for project reporting agents
Analyzing time allocation across projects from resource planning agents
Generating time reports for billing agents from Tempo worklog data
not_for: Teams not using Tempo (Jira-specific time tracking add-on)
Basic Jira time tracking without Tempo add-on
best_when: A software team using Jira + Tempo for time tracking wants AI agents to automate worklog entry, queries, and time reporting — reducing manual time logging overhead.
avoid_when: You use native Jira time tracking without Tempo, or use different time tracking tools (Harvest, Toggl, etc.) — Tempo is a specific Jira add-on with its own API.

auth.notes: Tempo API token required. Generated from Tempo app settings. Scoped to the Tempo workspace and user permissions.

pricing.free_tier_limits: None — Tempo requires paid Jira add-on subscription
pricing.notes: Tempo is a paid Jira add-on. MCP server is free open source by ofalvai. Requires active Tempo subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Tempo API rate limits apply; typically 500 requests/10 seconds

known_agent_gotchas: Tempo requires existing Jira issue keys — agents need Jira context to log time correctly
Worklog data may contain billable hours — billing consequences if agents log time incorrectly
Tempo API v3 and v4 differ — ensure server uses correct version for your Tempo instance
Community server by ofalvai — works well but follows Tempo API updates with some lag
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS to Tempo cloud API. API token authentication. Worklog data includes employee time and potentially billable hours — sensitive business data. Token is user-scoped.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee time and billing data. API token required. Tempo SOC2 compliant. Review agent permissions for worklog creation carefully.
